overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic billboards, and mixed architectural styles. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing cinematic lighting, heavy atmospheric rain, and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with cylindrical digital billboard

events.description: walkway curves slightly to the right while maintaining elevation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway next to a massive cylindrical billboard displaying boxing advertisements

entered.detail: massive circular structure with rotating digital displays showing boxing imagery and product ads
painted green safety railing with vertical bars along the walkway edge
multi-lane road visible through railing with moving vehicle lights
tall black pole with bright white light illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway during a heavy rainstorm, passing a massive cylindrical digital billboard displaying boxing advertisements. The green metal railing separates the walkway from the highway below, while street lamps cast bright light on the wet reflective surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined city sidewalk with red curbs

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level sidewalk with palm trees
dark vehicle with bright headlights drives past on the right side road

agents.ego_description: walking along street-level sidewalk past palm trees while vehicles pass on the adjacent wet road

notable_agents.action: car with headlights illuminated driving along the rain-slicked road

entered.detail: tall palm trees with textured trunks lining the sidewalk edge
suspended traffic signal with red lights glowing in the rain
futuristic structures with pink and purple neon lighting visible through haze

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the elevated walkway to street level, the scene opens into a palm-lined sidewalk with red-painted curbs. Vehicles pass by on the wet multi-lane road to the right, while futuristic neon-lit buildings glow in the distant haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with overgrown vegetation and utility infrastructure

events.description: yellow taxi passes by on the right side road moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past overgrown areas and utility poles while maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
tall weeds and wild grass growing along the curb and sidewalk cracks
multiple illuminated advertising screens stacked vertically visible down the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a more open stretch of urban sidewalk lined with utility poles and overgrown vegetation. The area shows signs of urban decay with weeds growing through cracks, while distant billboards and neon structures become more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed-use street with traditional architecture and illuminated storefronts

events.description: approaching traditional-style building with warm yellow interior lighting
passing into area with warmer artificial lighting from building entrances and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past traditional-style buildings and storefronts with illuminated signs and vending machines

entered.detail: single-story structure with warm yellow lighting, wooden facade, and covered porch area
illuminated business signs with Asian characters and neon accents
row of lit vending machines with blue and red glowing displays
scattered cardboard boxes and litter on the wet sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more built-up area featuring traditional wooden architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements. Warm yellow light spills from building entrances and vending machines, contrasting with the cool teal rain. Trash and debris litter the wet sidewalk, suggesting urban neglect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial walkway down into a neon-lit urban street during a heavy rainstorm. It begins by gliding along a concrete path beside a green metal railing, passing a massive cylindrical digital billboard flashing boxing advertisements under the glare of bright street lamps. As the camera descends from the height of the highway, the perspective shifts from the enclosed walkway to the open expanse of a street-level sidewalk. The scene then expands to reveal red-painted curbs and palm trees lining the path, while vehicles splash through the wet multi-lane road to the right. Finally, the view opens toward a distant haze where futuristic buildings glow with vibrant neon lights against the rainy night.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying urban corridor that gradually transitions into a densely packed district of mixed architectural styles. It begins on an open stretch of sidewalk where utility poles and overgrown vegetation emerge from cracks in the pavement, while distant neon billboards loom ahead through the rain. As the camera advances, the open space narrows and the environment shifts toward a more built-up area where traditional wooden structures blend with futuristic cyberpunk elements. The cool teal tones of the storm then contrast with warm yellow light spilling from vending machines and building entrances, before the view settles on a wet sidewalk littered with debris and urban neglect.
